title: K-200 Propulsion Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-469-G. Revision: G. Type: analysis. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2024-11-23. Last modified: 2025-08-07. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1024, P-1085.
